## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] The resource is **from scratch** (not a framework/SDK quickstart), freely accessible, and the link resolves.
- [ ] It adds something the existing picks don't (≤ 3 per section — if adding a 4th, I said which it replaces).
- [ ] Entry uses the format: `- [Title](url) — Author · one-line why`.
- [ ] If a reference implementation: it runs with `node`, is dependency-free, and ships its own README.
